final:
module RefModule(
   input           clk,
   input           rst,
   input [3:0]     PI,
   input           load,
   output          SO  
);
    reg [3:0] obf_Q;
    
    always@(posedge clk) begin
        if(rst) obf_Q <= 4'b0; // Reset the register
        else if(load) obf_Q <= PI; // Load parallel input
        else obf_Q <= {1'b0, obf_Q[3:1]}; // Shift right
    end
    
    assign SO = obf_Q[0]; // Serial output is the last bit of the register
endmodule
